title: justicia sonorae
intro: Justicia sonorae, also known as the desert marigold or Sonoran justicia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Justicia sonorae include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
